alt_text: Tayyibi cosmological diagram of the Qaimi Haykal. Twelve boxes labelled '29.5 Imam' (each paired with 'صورات' / Forms) surround a central human figure labelled 'امام' (Imam) with '+1' and '355' inside it. The header equation reads '29.5 × 12 = 354'.
notes: Pedagogical Tayyibi cosmology: 12 Imams × 29.5 = 354 spiritual forms plus the central Imam (+1) = 355 — the symbolic 'standing form' (qaimi haykal) of the cycle.
